name: OCR Fax Outbound (poll intake)
description: SQS INTAKE from fax-consumer: communicationId -> s3Key -> Captricity create/upload/submit.

pipeline.script: response = { batchName: (request.batchName || request.name || ('ecrm-' + Date.now())), name: (request.batchName || request.name || ('ecrm-' + Date.now())), workflowId: String(request.workflowId || request.workflow_id || '538'), fileName: (request.fileName || request.file_name || ((request.communicationId || 'document') + '.pdf')), communicationId: request.communicationId || request.communication_id, programId: request.programId, sourceType: request.sourceType || 'FAX', tenantId: request.tenantId, s3Key: request.s3Key || request.s3_key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, hasFilePayload: !!(request.s3Key || request.s3_key || request.hasFilePayload || mainReq.body.s3Key) };

body.script: response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.name, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, s3Key: req.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, hasFilePayload: req.body.hasFilePayload, batchId: String((res && (res.batchId || res.id || (res.raw && res.raw.id))) || ''), createResponse: res };

var cid = req.body.communicationId || mainReq.body.communicationId; var bid = req.body.batchId; response = { batchId: bid, fileName: req.body.fileName || mainReq.body.fileName || 'document.pdf', s3Key: req.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, fileField: 'uploaded_file', contentType: mainReq.body.contentType || 'application/pdf', communicationId: cid, metadata: { batch_file_metadata: [{ metadata: { communication_ref: String(cid || bid || '') } }] } };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, batchId: req.body.batchId, uploaded: true, uploadResponse: res };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, batchId: req.body.batchId, uploaded: req.body.uploaded, submitted: true, submitResponse: res };

pipeline.script: response = { success: true, batchId: request.batchId, workflowId: request.workflowId, fileName: request.fileName, communicationId: request.communicationId, submitted: !!request.submitted };
